name: Receipt Printer and Integrated EFTPOS - Troubleshooting
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Retail Express Hardware Utility is designed to allow the communication of Retail Express (which runs in an Internet Browser) to communicate via your local network connection to the hardware (Docket Receipt Printer and Tyro Integrated EFTPOS Terminals) connected to that PC."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This guide covers the most common issues that can cause problems when running the Hardware Utility or using the hardware itself."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "(Related: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Receipt Printer and Integrated EFTPOS - Setup and FAQ"}, {"text": ")"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Some elements of this article may require assistance from your local computer technician if you are unsure how to install & configure the software listed below."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the headings below to view further information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Installation"}], "data-id": "installation"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/212-receipt-printer-and-integrated-eftpos-troubleshooting#installation-wont-run", "children": [{"text": "The Hardware Utility Installation won't run"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this situation the issue is typically caused by one of the following reasons:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Missing or outdated prerequisites: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "The computer is missing some of the "}, {"text": "prerequisites"}, {"text": " software programs, or is outdated. These will need to be checked and confirmed before retrying the installation"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Access restricted: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "The user account for the computer is not an Administrator, and doesn't have access. Log out of the computer and log back in with an Administrator account."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Using the Hardware Utility"}], If it's a USB and using the Epson Virtual Port Driver, remove the COM Port assignment. "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/212-receipt-printer-and-integrated-eftpos-troubleshooting#cannot-open-tyro", "children": [{"text": "Cannot open Tyro Configuration/Tyro "loop""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "It is very important to open the Tyro Configuration to verify the key in order for Tyro to integrate. However, sometimes the Tyro configuration will enter an endless loop, typically caused by an issue attempting to remove an older version."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To resolve the issue:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Close the Hardware Utility ", "bold": true}, {"text": "before proceeding"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the Windows "}, {"text": "Control", "bold": true}, {"text": "Panel ", "bold": true}, {"text": "(click the "}, {"text": "Start ", "bold": true}, {"text": "menu and type "Control Panel")"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Program & Features", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the "}, {"text": "Tyro Terminal Adapter ", "bold": true}, {"text": "and check the version"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppc1cEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppc1cEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-09T120804.330.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Download", "bold": true}, {"text": " the installation file for that version by navigating to the URL "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://integrationdownloads.tyro.com/TyroTerminalAdapter/1.2.23/Installer(TyroTerminalAdapter).msi", "children": [{"text": "https://integrationdownloads.tyro.com/TyroTerminalAdapter/x.x.xx/Installer(TyroTerminalAdapter).msi"}]}, {"text": " replacing the x in the URL with the version e.g."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Control Panel ", "bold": true}, {"text": "highlight "}, {"text": "Tyro ", "bold": true}, {"text": "and click uninstall"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If prompted for a .msi file, locate the file downloaded in step 5"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once uninstalled, "}, {"text": "re-run the Hardware Utility ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to reinstall Tyro"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After assigning a Register and clicking finish, if using Windows XP you will need to read the following KB article:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "XP "Run as" prompt keeps coming up when running the Hardware Utility"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Windows Vista and newer do have the same prompts as Windows XP, therefore the Hardware Utility should complete successfully."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you find it necessary to check, the Application section of the Event Viewer will contain a RetailExpress folder. There should be around 10 new entries and none should contain errors. Generally, any errors that may appear are related to not having Administrator access on the machine."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Hardware Utility Update - Microsoft .NET"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Receipt Printing"}], "data-id": "receipt-printing"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/212-receipt-printer-and-integrated-eftpos-troubleshooting#receipt-symbols", "children": [{"text": "Receipt printer printing symbols instead of a dollar ($) symbol"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If your Receipts are printing symbols (question marks etc) instead of a dollar ($) symbol, it may be due to the regional settings on your computer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Refer to the article "}, {"text": "Receipt Printer - Fix dollar signs $ printing as questions marks ? on receipts"}, {"text": " for detailed information on how to resolve the issue."}]}]
